transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete statistics and a personal conversion story add texture, but relentless commands, inflated assurances, and repeated addiction analogies make the chapter feel coercive and overextended before a redundant summary.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete statistics and a personal conversion story add texture, but relentless commands, inflated assurances, and repeated addiction analogies make the chapter feel coercive and overextended before a redundant summary.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Exact textual duplication produces craft parity; both rely on reiteration and emphatic formatting to sustain persuasion, which gradually replaces narrative development with mechanical insistence.
